info.name: Expensify Financial Auditor API
info.description: Complete API collection for testing the Advanced Financial Auditor

request.description: Send expense data for comprehensive audit analysis. Returns risk assessment, violations, anomalies, fraud signals, insights, recommendations, and visualization data.
